_d5_retrofit_note: Retrofitted by D5 sprint 2026-06-04 (C.8 — RETROFIT-with-3D-placement). v1.6.0 → v1.7.0: this is the ONLY retrofit needing 3D placement migration — highbay luminaires are typically suspended from roof truss in an industrial shed. All 32 luminaires receive mount_type='suspended' (MT-03) per the existing v1.6 drawing_note 'suspended on chain or rod from steel structure'. 3D arithmetic from v1.6 room geometry: ceiling_height_mm=8000, hm_mm=8000, working_plane_mm=0 → z_mm = working_plane_mm + hm_mm = 0+8000 = 8000; suspension_length_mm = ceiling_height_mm − z_mm = 8000−8000 = 0 (the v1.6 record has hm_mm equal to ceiling_height_mm — luminaire flange co-planar with deck soffit). INV-16 (suspended inequality), INV-17 (clearance), INV-18 (hm_mm derivation) become non-vacuous PASS for the first time in retrofits (C.1–C.7 used mount_type='recessed' for which INV-16/17/18 were vacuously PASS). Zone Z2 (main floor): honest single-purpose collapse to purpose='task' (ZP-01) with em_target_lux=200 (Table 5 warehouse_low); the v1.6 brief never declared pick-rack vs aisle zones for this open 30×20 m floor, and synthesising a split would invent geometry not in the brief. Zone Z3 (emergency anti-panic): mapped to purpose='circulation' (closest BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.2.2 enum match — escape-route function); em_target_lux=0.5 (BS 5266-1:2016 §5.3 anti-panic minimum, non-Table-5 entry disclosed). Engineering content unchanged; honest disclosure mirrored in output.calculation_summary.assumptions[], output.rationale.sections[v1.7 retrofit], and reasoning.md §D5.

photometric_ies_paths._source: Synthetic industrial highbay LED, 5000K, narrow-beam reflector for 8m+ mounting. Distribution: Gaussian per CIBSE LG7 §6.2 typical industrial highbay. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3. Cascade retrofit per photometric-analysis v1.0 sprint D.2; engineer-of-record substitutes project IES before final design freeze.

Synthetic 300x100mm emergency luminaire (self-contained 3h duration, anti-panic), 4000K. Distribution: Lambertian. Per BS 5266-1:2016 §5.3 anti-panic minimum 0.5 lux floor. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3. Cascade retrofit per photometric-analysis v1.0 sprint D.2; engineer-of-record substitutes project IES before final design freeze.
